texto: Look at what has occurred in history. When the Berlin Wall fell, it was not surprising, but it was unexpected. Who predicted the Arab Spring? Nobody expected it, but all the ingredients were there. I think all the ingredients are also there for Quebec to become a country. But when? That's another question.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Gilles Duceppe que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Look at what has occurred in history. When the Berlin Wall fell, it was not surprising, but it wa…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, spring, think, com foco em think e unexpected.
